metadata.description: Complete Commerce Engine toolkit with router for SDK setup, authentication, catalog, cart/checkout, orders, webhooks, and SSR/meta-framework patterns (Next.js, TanStack Start, Astro, SvelteKit)

plugins.name: ce
plugins.description: Commerce Engine router - automatically routes to the right skill based on your e-commerce task

plugins.name: ce-setup
plugins.description: Set up the Commerce Engine TypeScript SDK in any project with framework detection and token storage selection

plugins.name: ce-auth
plugins.description: Commerce Engine authentication - anonymous auth, OTP login (email/phone/WhatsApp), password auth, token refresh, user profile management

plugins.name: ce-catalog
plugins.description: Commerce Engine product catalog - products, variants, SKUs, categories, faceted search, reviews, and recommendations

plugins.name: ce-cart-checkout
plugins.description: Commerce Engine cart management, checkout flow, and payment integration with hosted checkout support

plugins.name: ce-orders
plugins.description: Commerce Engine order management - create orders, shipment tracking, payment status, cancellation, returns, and refunds

plugins.name: ce-webhooks
plugins.description: Commerce Engine webhook events - 14 event types for orders, payments, refunds, and shipments with signature verification

plugins.name: ce-ssr-patterns
plugins.description: SSR/meta-framework patterns for Commerce Engine - Next.js and TanStack Start with publicStorefront(), clientStorefront(), serverStorefront(), bootstrap, server functions/actions, pre-rendering, and token management

plugins.name: ce-ssr
plugins.description: Build custom SSR bindings with @commercengine/ssr-utils for SvelteKit, Nuxt, Astro. CookieAdapter, ServerTokenStorage, and public vs session patterns.
